docket_entries.description: REMARK: RETURN OF SMALL CLAIMS "NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT". SENT TO: PLAINTIFF - REGINAL HELSON; (ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - NO SUCH NUMBER - UNABLE TO FORWARD)

TRIAL RESET TO MAY-03-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAR-25-2019 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-03-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-03-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF REGINALD HELSON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOHN FROTHINGHAM IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAVIES SERVICE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-03-2019 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM.
